products.title: LG 1.5 Ton 5 Star Dual Inverter Split AC (US-Q19YNZE3)
products.short_description: LG 1.5 Ton 5 Star Dual Inverter Split AC is designed for powerful cooling, low noise operation, and high energy efficiency, ideal for medium-sized rooms in Indian climate conditions.
products.long_description:
The LG US-Q19YNZE3 1.5 Ton 5 Star Dual Inverter Split AC delivers advanced cooling performance with LG’s Dual Inverter Compressor technology. It ensures faster cooling, better energy efficiency, and reduced noise levels compared to conventional ACs.

This model is built for medium-sized rooms and is capable of operating efficiently even at high ambient temperatures up to 55°C. It features AI Convertible 6-in-1 cooling modes that adjust power consumption based on user needs.

With a 4-way swing system, it ensures uniform air distribution across the room. The HD filter with anti-virus protection improves indoor air quality by capturing dust and harmful particles.

The AC also includes features like stabilizer-free operation, smart diagnosis, auto clean, and low gas detection for improved durability and ease of maintenance. Overall, it is a premium, energy-efficient AC suitable for long-term usage.
highlights: 5 Star energy rating for low power consumption
Dual Inverter Compressor for fast cooling
cons: Premium pricing compared to basic ACs
offers: Cashback via Amazon Pay ICICI card
